case_title: BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA VS ONGPIN, CENON C.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ONGPIN, CENON C. PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ONGPIN, CENON C. HEARING SET FOR APR-28-1997 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-28-1997, GRANTED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ONGPIN, CENON C.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONGPIN, CENON C. $2,140.72 PRINCIPAL, $55.82 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,196.54 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,140.72 FILED BY BENEFICIAL OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT ONGPIN, CENON C. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-14-1997, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-09-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
